description_long: This is a vintage-style record player with a rectangular wooden base featuring ornate gold patterns on its sides and front. The top is covered by a transparent, hinged dust cover made of tinted plastic, which is currently open. Inside, a circular turntable platter with a metallic rim is visible, along with a slender tonearm resting on its support. The front panel houses four round control knobs and a rectangular display or slot, likely for additional controls or a cassette/CD input. The overall finish is glossy, with a combination of dark wood, gold accents, and black components, giving it a classic, elegant appearance suitable for both indoor and urban retro-themed environments.
description: A vintage record player with a glossy wooden base, gold accents, a transparent open dust cover, and multiple control knobs on the front.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open dust cover, turntable platter, tonearm, and four control knobs with a display slot.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the ornate gold pattern on the side and the angled dust cover.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the platter and the symmetrical gold pattern, with less detail on controls.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the dust cover hinge and the side gold pattern, with the tonearm partially visible.
attribute_turntable_platter: The turntable platter is present, circular, and occupies a central position inside the record player. It has a metallic rim with a dark, likely rubberized surface for gripping records. The platter is smooth, with a subtle sheen, and appears to be slightly recessed into the wooden base. No visible grooves or decorative patterns are present.
attribute_tonearm: The tonearm is present, slender, and extends from the right side of the player toward the platter. It is medium-length, with a metallic or plastic construction, and is currently resting on its support. The tonearm has a matte finish and a visible joint near its base for pivoting.
attribute_stylus: The stylus is present, attached to the end of the tonearm. It is small, pointed, and appears to be made of metal or a similar hard material. The stylus is a distinct component, slightly protruding from the tonearm's end.
attribute_control_knobs: Four round control knobs are present on the front panel, evenly spaced and made of plastic or metal with a metallic finish. They are medium-sized, with a smooth, glossy surface, and are accompanied by a rectangular display or slot to their left. No visible labels or markings are discernible.
attribute_dust_cover: The dust cover is present, made of transparent, tinted plastic, and is currently open. It is attached to the base with two visible hinges on the sides, allowing it to be lifted or closed. The cover is slightly angular and covers the entire top of the record player when closed.
